title: Immersive Machinery ˣ Alex's Caves
description: A small integration mod between the mods "Immersive Machinery" and "Alex's Caves".
body:
# Details

A small integration mod between the mods "Immersive Machinery" and "Alex's Caves".

It adds the following:

* Allows the Copper Fin submarine from Immersive Machinery to be seen by Hullbreakers in the depths biome from Alex's Caves.
* All damage applied to the player while inside the Copper Fin is transfered to it instead.

# Mods required

The versions specified are the ones confirmed to work, newer or older versions may break the compatibility. If so, please notify me.

* [Immersive Aircraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-aircraft) (1.4.0)
* [Immersive Machinery](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-machinery) (0.2.0)
* [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves) (2.0.2)
